channel.title: Clearforge Features
channel.description: Long-form practical AI analysis from Clearforge.

item.title: AI’s biggest shift this week is not bigger models — it’s smaller frictions
item.description: A practical analysis of the week’s AI news: OpenAI’s live voice model, Meta’s built-in creation tools, Google Photos’ Video Remix, Microsoft’s enterprise implementation push, and ZML’s inference efficiency play — all signaling a shift from hype to workflow.

item.title: AI’s next phase is not smarter chat — it’s controlled systems
item.description: A practical analysis of this week’s AI news: agent security risks, enterprise AI infrastructure funding, cost-aware benchmarks, chip independence, and what they mean for creators, small businesses, and knowledge workers.
